nasb.text: Act as free men, and do not use your freedom as a covering for evil, but use it as bondslaves of God.

esv.text: Live as people who are free, not using your freedom as a cover-up for evil, but living as servants of God.

cnv.text: 你們是自由的人，但不要用自由來掩飾邪惡，總要像　神的僕人。

ccb.text: 你们是自由的人，不要以自由为借口去犯罪作恶，要做上帝的奴仆。

csbs.text: 做为自由人，你们不可拿自由当做恶事的借口，却要做神的奴仆。
